summary: CLI flag to override prefetch depth per restore run
description: Right now overriding HELIOS_PREFETCH_DEPTH means setting an environment variable before invoking the CLI, easy to forget to unset afterward. A --prefetch-depth flag scoped to a single invocation would be safer for one-off restores against NFS.

comments.author: Jonah Kim
comments.body: parseFlags in src/cli/flags.ts already parses --prefetch-depth, main.ts just needs to set the env var from the parsed flag before reloadConfig runs, most of this is already wired.

comments.author: Sam Whitfield
comments.body: oh nice, did not realize the flag parsing already existed

comments.author: Jonah Kim
comments.body: Wiring is in, still need to add a test covering the case where both the env var and the flag are set, flag should win. Not resolved yet.
